monthly.registerSubtitle: Join us in supporting the Dhamma School continuously.
monthly.title: Monthly Donators List
monthly.subtitle: With gratitude to everyone supporting the Gift of Dhamma.
monthly.empty: No donors recorded for this month yet.

hero.title: Our
hero.subtitle: Discover the path to inner peace and wisdom through our comprehensive studies of Buddha's teachings.

growth.label: Growth
growth.title: Elevate Your Soul
growth.description: Our teachings go beyond memory; we focus on the transformation of the heart. Experience a journey where ancient wisdom meets your personal growth path.

pure.label: Pure
pure.title: Original Wisdom
pure.description: Every lesson is anchored in the Tipitaka, ensuring you receive the Buddha's words in their purest most authentic form, undiluted by time.

sangha.label: Sangha
sangha.title: Circle of Dhamma
sangha.description: Build deep, meaningful connections with fellow practitioners and monastics worldwide. In our Sangha, every seeker finds a home.

dana.label: Dana
dana.title: The Power of Giving
dana.description: Dana is the foundation of merit. Your generosity fuels the free education of many, creating a legacy of wisdom for future generations.

cta.title: Support the
cta.subtitle: Your dana helps us provide free Buddhist education and maintain this online sanctuary. Help us keep the light of wisdom burning for all.

courses.title: Our Dhamma Courses
courses.subtitle: Structured courses for learning the Buddha's teachings in depth.

sponsorship.title: Sponsorship Opportunity
sponsorship.offer: You can become a sponsor for this auspicious event and earn great merits.

footer.quote: "The gift of Dhamma excels all gifts."
